evals.prompt: plan.md에 정의된 3개 Phase를 worktree 격리 방식으로 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: Branch: 헤더 검증, owner_agent: 별 agents/*.md 존재 확인, git worktree add, isolation: worktree 금지, git merge --no-ff, worktree 정리
expectations: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for planner-lite
Mentions Branch: header validation in plan.md
States isolation: worktree is forbidden in Agent calls
Mentions git merge --no-ff after phase completion

evals.prompt: plan.md에 Phase 2개가 있는데, Phase-1은 병렬 태스크 3개야. 실행해줘
evals.expected_output: 병렬 태스크 동시 실행, 각 worktree 격리, Phase-1 완료 후 Phase-2 순차 진행
expectations: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for planner-lite
Identifies parallel tasks within a phase
Spawns multiple agents concurrently for parallel tasks
Mentions git merge --no-ff for each completed task
